ksa_text: Skill in querying and extracting data from relational databases, data warehouses, and analytical repositories using SQL and programmatic methods, including writing performant queries against large datasets.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data analysis tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-002 (AB, Skill) maps to Survey Researcher scope as strong fit. Composite score 0.4329 clears the strong fit threshold of 0.35. Top framework anchors: nice=0.433, onet=0.428, dcwf=0.424. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4329 for strong fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AB-S-002 (AB, composite 0.4329) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with O*NET 15-2051.00 (Data Scientists), DCWF 411 (Data Analyst) and 421 profiles, DDAT Data Analyst role framework. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4329 with signal across nice=0.433, onet=0.428, dcwf=0.424 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4329, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
